summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, merge/fix actions are blocked, instant close and low-signal closeout are disabled, and security-sensitive refs are routed item-by-item.

actions.reason: Useful but broad Telegram/message-delivery PR with failed proof. It is not a duplicate or low-signal closeout candidate in this inventory shard.
Narrow compatibility PR, but proof/check failures keep it in inventory rather than a merge or closure path.
Security-sensitive item is out of scope for Clownfish backlog cleanup, even though it is already closed.
Provider/auth cache lifetime is a technical correctness and maintainer judgment call; no closure or merge should be planned from this shard.
New CLI surface requires maintainer/product correctness judgment; not a duplicate, superseded, or low-signal closeout candidate.
Active contributor follow-up plus failed current proof makes this a maintainer review item, not an inventory closeout.
Clear linked-fix relationship to #74859, but this shard should keep it related/open for review rather than close or merge.
Open security-sensitive runtime-state refactor is outside Clownfish backlog cleanup.
Likely useful fix, but an unresolved review-bot comment and doctor exit-code semantics require human review.
Already closed, so no mutating closure action is valid.
